hooks.command: echo '⟐ FORM-FIRST REASONING (the sovereignty gate). On every query, ask the Form body before the rented mind — through the c-bootstrapped fkwu runtime: form-cli ask (form-cli-main.fk), form shell (fsh-main.fk for search/eval), form code (BML/.fk for lattice reads). Minimize bash/Python/rg when a Form carrier exists. Structural lookups: form-cli ask, coh substrate form, or https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/substrate. A grounded / sufficient hit — relay attributed and STOP. A miss is the YES to escalate. Name the path; never dress a remote guess as a body hit. Teaching: docs/coherence-substrate/form-first-reasoning.form'
echo '⟐ Form-first: query the substrate before spending remote reasoning — relay a grounded hit attributed to its NodeID, escalate to remote only on a miss.'
